title: B10. Mean-Field Lattice Gas Occupancy
label: mx1_execute_20
task_text:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: architecture-derived-B10-mean-field-lattice-gas-occupancy
Title: B10. Mean-Field Lattice Gas Occupancy

Problem:
Grand canonical ensemble, mean-field approximation.

Given:

- e = -(k_B T)/(2*pi)
- mu = 0.1 * k_B T
- z_h = 4
- z_v = 8
- T = 300 K

Find occupancy <n>.

Grading target:
Numerical match within 0.01.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
root_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: 0.518
JUSTIFICATION: Solved the mean-field self-consistency equation <n> = [1 + exp(-(mu - z*e*<n>)/k_B T)]^-1 with z=12.
final_result_excerpt:
FINAL_ANSWER: 0.518
JUSTIFICATION: Solved the mean-field self-consistency equation <n> = [1 + exp(-(mu - z*e*<n>)/k_B T)]^-1 with z=12.
